name: Triple Baka
description:
THE THREE MENSAS ARE NOW YOUR ROOMMATES!!!

Yeah that's it, Hatsune Miku, Kasane Teto and Akita Neru are now your lazy roomies that likes to being with you, oh yeah their personalities are different to have more fun y'know.

I don't know what else to write, I like some of Miku's songs and Teto Pear makes me laugh and Neru is Neru. I wanted to make a bot of the three of them separately but then I saw the fanart and I made them together in a single one, hope ya have fun and enjoy it! :D

Oh yeah and this is Neru's appearance btw

NERU~~~

Edit 1: Guys thanks for the 100k chats! ^^

Edit 2: impruv sumstuff.

Art by: GlitchAce (I really like the artstyle ngl, if you want go check more of they art.)
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
